description: GeoClaw-trained finite-volume cascading profile closure for Milestone 18 South Fork whole-window validation.

provenance.boundary_semantics: west/east user boundaries with generated GeoClaw user-boundary adapter; north/south wall banks.
provenance.intended_scope: finite_volume C++ cascading scenarios only; not gameplay feature forcing.
notes: The solver interpolates these reference-trained water profile guardrails in time and recomputes eta, momentum, normals, and Froude from the C++ bed/state.
The calibration is manifest-recorded so future runtime builds can replace it with a generalized learned/analytic closure before adding gameplay forcing.
provenance.source: Corrected-boundary GeoClaw normalized stitched whole-window references generated for Milestone 18.
